content.body: annevk: I've implemented https://github.com/whatwg/html/pull/12428 but think there's still a problem. Adding and removing the muted content attribute will affect the muted IDL attribute and :muted pseudo-class, but never fire the volumechange event. I've now implemented a different approach which is closer to the original behavior. Instead of a default muted state that reads the content attribute, there's an unset or initial muted state. Adding the content attribute would set the muted state to true, which could happen once. That would be the only observable change to .muted or :muted that doesn't fire a volumechange event. WDYT?
